prompt_replacements.old: Each membership test asks one predicate about one candidate property. Create separate EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT tests for different properties, even when they consume the same input; omit predicates already enforced by answer_expression.
prompt_replacements.new: Each membership test is one independent candidate condition not already enforced by answer_expression. Specified group members are enforced by group_key and are not membership tests.

prompt_replacements.old: GROUP_KEY inputs are not candidate-row predicates; create no EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT for them.
